mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Zephyr SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Zephyr SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at NA; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Zephyr SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Zephyr SIG maintains 3 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Zephyr.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Zephyr SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Zephyr SIG has 3 Maintainers, including: Wayne Ren, Guoliang Li, Chenglai Xiong. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
